paths.notes: This file itself. Only writable by `code-architect owners bootstrap` or `owners migrate`; never a general edit target.
Config dir for CA-managed lockfiles + contracts. Run.lock is handled atomically by safe-json; humans review anything else.
CFO's mesh outbox state. Written by CFO's daemon; CA must never touch.
Shared mesh state (outbox, inbox, etc). Owned by CFO's runtime; CA never writes.
In-tree Python tests for scripts. Mechanical refactors common; DA-gated.
Top-level test tree. Mechanical refactors common; DA-gated.
Shared library code (qb_auth, helpers, parsers). Low blast radius; DA-gated.
Lockfile churn from `npm install` is mechanical; DA-gated. (CFO is primarily Python; node is for tooling only.)

CFO's runtime logs (activity, heartbeat, alerts, snapshot, nudges history). CFO writes; CA never. The high-churn cfo-activity.json should be gitignored separately — that's a .gitignore task, not an owners.json policy.
CFO's financial data dir (snapshots, ledgers, invoice drafts). Owned by CFO's runtime; CA never writes.
CFO's financial-strategy knowledge base (tax KB, vendor classifications, etc). CFO writes; CA may read for graph-walk.
Receipt images and metadata. PII + financial; owner only. Gitignored anyway per CFO's .gitignore.
Alerts pipeline (financial_monitor.py, send_alerts.py). Triggers financial decisions; humans review.
Financial calcs (burn rate, tax threshold monitor, tax setaside, entity comparison). Accuracy is load-bearing; humans review.
Flask dashboard (app.py, templates/, static/). User-facing; humans review.
Client-outreach nudges. Sends to clients; humans review every change.
launchd plist + scheduling. Deploy-pipeline territory; humans review.
Catch-all for top-level scripts (daily_snapshot.py, qb_*, etc) and any unknown subdirs. Default to human review until a sub-lane is carved out explicitly.
CI/CD workflows. Deploy-pipeline; CLAUDE.md T3 + DA-mandatory. Defensive entry — no .github/workflows exists today.
Node tooling deps + scripts. Humans review additions/removals.
Python deps. Humans review additions/removals.

fallback.notes: Default-deny posture: anything not matched above (top-level .md docs, CLAUDE.md/LANGUAGE.md/SETUP-GUIDE.md/MASTER-BUILDOUT-PROMPT.md, .gitignore, ad-hoc files in docs/) requires human review.
